since_last: 38% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.17%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.61% · BTC -2.26% · Gold -1.82% · Nasdaq100 -0.34%. 38% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.17%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.17%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.49%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.49%, BIDU +5.71%, ANET +4.91%, AVGO +4.22%, CEVA +3.53%. Laggards: PANW -4.78%, ZS -4.49%, PLTR -4.26%, UPST -4.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.61% at $150.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.61% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
